formula_note: lr = round(min(exp(A*ln(N)+B) * exp(C*ln(iter)+D) / exp(C*ln(1000)+D), 0.5), 6) with coeffs {A,B,C,D} keyed by (target_type, CPU, use_best_model, boost_from_average).
gate_note: learning_rate / leaf_estimation_method / leaf_estimation_iterations / l2_leaf_reg are ALL unset so TAutoLRParamsGuesser fires (options_helper.cpp:269-288).
